text:
Galgaida (ガルガイダー, Garugaidā—or "Gargaidar" in the Viz translation) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

Summary

This fish when cooked, tastes delicious.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1217 :: ガルガイダ 
この島の３大珍味の１つ。外見から想像できないほど繊細な味がある。雌の卵には長寿の効果があると信じられている。煮ても焼いてもうまい。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1217 :: Galgaida 
One of three delicacies of the island. It tastes unbelievably delicate despite its appearance. And is good either grilled or stewed. The eggs are believed to be a key to longevity.
|}

Trivia

In Chapter 129, Gon and Killua win this card from the Cat Diner NPC.
In the Viz translation of Chapter 133 the card name is changed to or erroneously written as "Gargaider(s)".
